sn.s: Una noche, Lucía y yo hablamos del futuro.
sn.e: One night, Lucía and I talk about the future.

sn.s: "¿Cómo te imaginás nuestra vida?" me pregunta.
sn.e: "How do you imagine our life?" she asks me.

sn.s: "Sueño con una casa pequeña, con un jardín."
sn.e: "I dream of a small house, with a garden."

sn.s: "Ojalá podamos tenerla algún día," dice ella.
sn.e: "I hope we can have it someday," she says.

sn.s: "Quiero que construyamos algo juntos," le digo.
sn.e: "I want us to build something together," I tell her.

sn.s: "Yo también lo deseo con todo el corazón."
sn.e: "I want that too, with all my heart."

sn.s: Hablamos de viajes, de planes, de esperanzas.
sn.e: We talk about trips, plans, hopes.

sn.s: "Espero que siempre nos apoyemos," dice Lucía.
sn.e: "I hope we always support each other," Lucía says.

sn.s: "Pase lo que pase, vamos a estar juntos."
sn.e: "No matter what happens, we'll be together."

sn.s: El futuro se siente posible a su lado.
sn.e: The future feels possible by her side.

sn.s: "Compartir un sueño es un compromiso," pienso.
sn.e: "Sharing a dream is a commitment," I think.

sn.s: No sé qué traerá la vida, pero la quiero a ella.
sn.e: I don't know what life will bring, but I want her in it.

sn.s: Planear un futuro juntos es un acto de amor.
sn.e: Planning a future together is an act of love.

sn.s: Y ojalá ese futuro apenas comienza.
sn.e: And hopefully that future is just beginning.
